sections.title: Welcome
text: Welcome! It looks like you're interested in joining the Gordano Model Flying Club, and we're glad you're here.
As part of our joining process, we ask that all new members come along and meet us first, it's a great opportunity for us to get to know each other.
Please contact us and we'll get a time sorted for you to come down to the club, we'd love to show you around!

sections.title: Training
text: We'd love nothing more than to have a full-time trainer on hand, but like most clubs, we rely on something far more valuable, our members.
The experienced flyers in our club are a fantastic bunch, and they're always happy to pass on their knowledge. The best way to tap into that is simply to come down and have a chat.

Grab a flask and some sandwiches, pull up a chair, and enjoy the flying. You'll pick up a wealth of knowledge just by being there. The tips and advice that could genuinely save you time, money, and a few crashes along the way!
The RC hobby can feel overwhelming at first, but don't let that put you off. Everyone starts somewhere, and you'll be surprised how quickly it all starts to click.
